items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Runs consolidated vs per-location reports', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding the actual reporting functionality. While the linked use case describes the multi-location operations, there are no concrete results or traces captured that demonstrate the expected outcome of the scenario. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
